name: funding_carry_data_manifest

spot_perp.eth_spot_source: free (Binance Vision spot klines / yfinance ETH-USD) — fetch in P1
spot_perp.perp_price_source: free (Binance Vision futures/um klines; 123olp on disk)

timestamp_rule: funding settles every 8h; realized rate known at settlement t; signal uses funding<=t, earns the next settlement (t+1 interval) -> leak-safe.
universe: BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT perps — never delisted -> survivorship-clean (cross-sectional top-N deferred).

cost_model.note: delta-neutral carry = long spot / short perp; cost paid at entry/exit only, funding earned each 8h held -> NOT a per-trade taker bet (escapes the microstructure cost wall).
